title: December 2024 ideas list — BroMenu seed, Side Quest, AI seed-bed
html:
December 2024 ideas list — BroMenu seed, Side Quest, AI seed-bed

Source: 2024-12-28 Apple Note (last modified 2026-03-10 — long-running). Two weeks after leaving China, Yahir dumps 20+ app and business ideas in one running note. The seedbed for Brotein, BroMenu, several stealth-apps, and the AI search thesis.

TL;DR

  • First explicit BroMenu thesis: "BroMenu, what is the most anabolic menu item to hit your protein goals?" — the anabolic scoring concept distilled.
  • TikTok-style swipe betting app with micro-prediction payouts based on accuracy — the peer wager app concept.
  • Clash Royale betting app — sister concept.
  • Weed + snack drive thru (recurring since 2022 09 13 drive thru weed).
  • Regional midnight ghost kitchen (targeting tech workers).
  • Horse rights / Horse semen breeding / track tickets marketplace — public-market integration angle, rare creative left turn.
  • TurboTax for immigration (recurring from 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream).
  • Wrld Side Quests (fully developed elsewhere).
  • Side quest app — sister to wrld side quests.
  • Personal AI avatar / "personal entity online".
  • Activity-status widget that auto-broadcasts to friends so you stay focused — color-coded ("blue = gym, green = school, red = danger") integrated with Find My iPhone + Life360. Pre-cursor to safety-features in Brotein.
  • CarBUDDY — talk to AI that curates conversations while you drive.
  • AI SEO — bare two-letter mention, one of the earliest written AI-search hints before Rankett.
  • iMessage diet and set app + WeRun In America + Conveyor Hotpot place — Chinese food/fitness import ideas.
  • Arbitrage opportunities from China to US, Livestream selling (Gary Vee wave), Interactionless hotel check-ins, QR codes in every restaurant, Food lockers for delivery, Pinduoduo group buying, WeChat group-step tracking — the whole China-import playbook in one block.

Pattern observed

The China-export idea bank: Yahir comes back from Shanghai with a notebook full of consumer-tech patterns the US hasn't fully imported (group buying, livestream selling, QR-pervasive UX, interactionless service). Half of Brotein's features (group share, leaderboard, WeRun) trace back to specific WeChat patterns surfaced here.

The bullet "AI SEO" with no elaboration is the buried seed of Rankett — written 13 months before the December 2025 Rankett pivot. The graph traces.

Open questions

  • The "horse semen breeding marketplace" idea — was this a real consideration or pure noise?
  • Why does the activity-status widget never get built? (Closest realization: Brotein's group-share feature.)
  • Did the "selling to childless 40yo men" target market from 2024 07 04 questions inform any of these?
